title: quercus lobata subsp. turbinata
intro: Quercus lobata subsp. turbinata, also known as the California live oak, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus lobata subsp. turbinata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
